title: DO NOT MERGE - CI CHECK
body:
Some (pod) tests are failing on the main branch on at least 3
maintainers' machines.  Let's see what CI has to say.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>
